title: Effect of Derogatory Record Discovered After Issuance or Renewal of License
content: If a derogatory record is discovered after the issuance or renewal of a license, the license of a single proprietorship or a partnership shall be suspended. Additionally, the appointment of any officer or employee with a derogatory record may be cancelled or revoked.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
